title: woof plan
description: Ordered executable work units. Epic-backed plans are Stage 3 Breakdown output; pre-decomposed intake plans are supplied work-unit-set aggregates. Validates structural shape only. The runtime Plan aggregate enforces work-unit identity and dependency invariants; cross-artefact invariants (satisfies[] subset of EPIC.md.observable_outcomes[].id, every CD implemented by exactly one work unit, duplicate pathspec discipline, and state coherence) are enforced before the plan gate and again by the work-unit cross-reference check when an epic contract exists.

epic_id.description: Tracker-assigned epic identifier for epic-backed plans. Mirrors EPIC.md.epic_id while the epic graph stores plan.json under epics/E<N> in the project state root in the operator home.

context.description: Structured aggregate identity. Epic-backed intake uses project_ref plus epic_id; pre-decomposed intake uses a stable work-unit-set id and optional source_ref.

goal.description: One-sentence prose summary of the epic outcome.

set_id.description: Stable identity for this pre-decomposed aggregate.

source_ref.description: Optional natural source identity, such as a tracker URL or repo-relative source path.

id.description: Stable work-unit ID, unique within the plan.

summary.description: Prose, 1-3 sentences: what this work unit produces and why.

bounded_context.description: Optional subsystem or seam this unit is bounded to.

paths.description: Glob patterns the work unit is allowed to touch (using git-pathspec syntax). Stage 5 Check 3 fails if the diff includes files outside these globs.

acceptance.description: Verifiable acceptance signals for this work unit.

deps.description: Work-unit IDs that must reach state=done before this unit runs. Subset relationship to work_units[].id is helper-checked.

satisfies.description: Optional contract-trace outcome IDs from EPIC.md.observable_outcomes this work unit realises.

implements_contract_decisions.description: Optional contract-trace IDs this work unit is the surface creator for. Each CD in EPIC.md must appear in exactly one work unit's implements_contract_decisions across the plan when trace fields are present (helper-validated).

uses_contract_decisions.description: Optional contract-trace IDs this work unit consumes without creating. Multiple work units may use the same CD.

count.description: Estimated number of new tests. Not enforced at Stage 5.

types.description: Test families (unit, integration, e2e, regression, ...). Project-defined.

state.description: Lifecycle state. pending/in_progress/done are the normal path; abandoned is the terminal state set by the abandon_work_unit gate verb (skipped, never delivered, distinct from done).

empty_diff.description: True iff this work unit completed without producing a diff because earlier units' changes already realised its outcomes. Only meaningful when state=done. Per current operator policy, empty-diff completions open a work_unit_gate (triggered_by includes 'empty_diff_review') rather than auto-completing.
